title: Wyzpack
description: Epic visuals, smoother performance, and long-distance worlds!
body:
# 🚀 Description

## Step into a next-level Minecraft adventure!
This modpack upgrades your world to Minecraft 1.21.8, powered by NeoForge for smoother gameplay and better mod support.

## 🌟 What makes it special?

🌄 Endless horizons – With Distant Horizons enabled by default, you can see your world stretch farther than ever before. (Don’t worry, you can toggle it off in the settings if you prefer.)

✨ Stunning visuals – A hand-picked collection of shaders is included, ready to switch on whenever you want:

BSL Shaders v10.0 – Crisp, colorful, and balanced

Complementary Shaders – Reimagined r5.5.1 – Cinematic and vibrant

Complementary Shaders – Unbound r5.5.1 – Ultimate flexibility and beauty

Photon Shaders v1.2a – Lightweight and glowing atmosphere

## 🎮 Why play this pack?

Because Minecraft should feel bigger, brighter, and more epic. Whether you’re building megabases, exploring faraway lands, or just chilling with friends, this pack makes every block shine.
